class.name: GDKSystem
class.brief_description: System/runtime metadata service accessed via GDK.system.
class.description: Exposes small synchronous wrappers for PC-relevant title/runtime facts from the GDK runtime. Methods return [GDKResult] so unavailable values can report structured error codes and messages.

method.name: get_title_id
method.description: Returns the current Xbox title ID as [code]int[/code] in [code]GDKResult.data[/code]. Returns an error when the title identity is unavailable.

method.name: get_title_id_hex
method.description: Returns the current Xbox title ID as an uppercase [code]0x[/code]-prefixed hex string in [code]GDKResult.data[/code].

method.name: get_sandbox_id
method.description: Returns the current sandbox ID string in [code]GDKResult.data[/code]. Returns an error if the sandbox ID cannot be read.

method.name: get_service_configuration_id
method.description: Returns the current service configuration ID (SCID) string in [code]GDKResult.data[/code] when Xbox services are initialized.

method.name: is_xbox_services_initialized
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the shared Xbox services scaffold has been initialized.
